'''鈭歞h-w-b-t''' ('''kadhawbetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:allergise|allergise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-b-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:allergise|allergise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-w-b-t
|-
! Lemma
| kadhawbetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhawbetoko|thidhawbetoko]] || [[word:jidhawbetoko|jidhawbetoko]] || [[word:shidhawbetoko|shidhawbetoko]] || [[word:kidhawbetoko|kidhawbetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhawbetoko|thuthudhawbetoko]] || [[word:jujudhawbetoko|jujudhawbetoko]] || [[word:shushudhawbetoko|shushudhawbetoko]] || [[word:kukudhawbetoko|kukudhawbetoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhawbetoko|thudhawbetoko]] || [[word:judhawbetoko|judhawbetoko]] || [[word:shudhawbetoko|shudhawbetoko]] || [[word:kudhawbetoko|kudhawbetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhawbetoko|thedhawbetoko]] || [[word:jedhawbetoko|jedhawbetoko]] || [[word:shedhawbetoko|shedhawbetoko]] || [[word:kedhawbetoko|kedhawbetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhawbetoko|thothodhawbetoko]] || [[word:jojodhawbetoko|jojodhawbetoko]] || [[word:shoshodhawbetoko|shoshodhawbetoko]] || [[word:kokodhawbetoko|kokodhawbetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhawbetoko|thodhawbetoko]] || [[word:jodhawbetoko|jodhawbetoko]] || [[word:shodhawbetoko|shodhawbetoko]] || [[word:kodhawbetoko|kodhawbetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhawbetoko|thodhawbetoko]] || [[word:jodhawbetoko|jodhawbetoko]] || [[word:shodhawbetoko|shodhawbetoko]] || [[word:kodhawbetoko|kodhawbetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhawbetoko|th忙dhawbetoko]] || [[word:j忙dhawbetoko|j忙dhawbetoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhawbetoko|sh忙dhawbetoko]] || [[word:k忙dhawbetoko|k忙dhawbetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhawbetoko|thathadhawbetoko]] || [[word:jajadhawbetoko|jajadhawbetoko]] || [[word:shashadhawbetoko|shashadhawbetoko]] || [[word:kakadhawbetoko|kakadhawbetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhawbetoko|thadhawbetoko]] || [[word:jadhawbetoko|jadhawbetoko]] || [[word:shadhawbetoko|shadhawbetoko]] || [[word:kadhawbetoko|kadhawbetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhawbetoko|thadhawbetoko]] || [[word:jadhawbetoko|jadhawbetoko]] || [[word:shadhawbetoko|shadhawbetoko]] || [[word:kadhawbetoko|kadhawbetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
